blended.narrative: Discovery is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,889 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 46".
